titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Department of Athletics, Yale University, Motion Pictures Documenting Field Hockey
Department of Athletics, Yale University, Motion Pictures Documenting Field Hockey
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday January 7, 2019 at 10:05
finding aid revisiion description not supplied

did.unittitle: Department of Athletics, Yale University, motion pictures documenting field hockey
did.abstract: The materials consist of videotapes created by the Department of Athletics documenting women's field hockey at Yale.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 38-B (YRG 38-B), Records documenting specific sports at Yale.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The materials were transferred from the Department of Athletics, 2005.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Department of Athletics, Yale University, Motion Pictures Documenting Field Hockey (RU 987). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of videotapes created by the Department of Athletics documenting women's field hockey at Yale.

corpname.part: Yale University ( Field hockey) -- Field hockey
